boundaries: A text match proves only that the quoted character sequence occurs in a selected local witness.
Manual form adjudication records abridgement, stitching, editorial prose, OCR errors, and transcription variants without accepting a traditional interpretation or modern medical claim.
CText and Wikisource are public transcription witnesses used for character-level collation; they are not identified edition-level facsimiles.
nihaisha-nishi-tcm page cards are secondary locators only; where a page card repeats 火逆 or modernizes 㽲痛, it cannot override the independent classical witnesses.
Duplicate matches in Jingui Yaolue and Shanghanlun are retained as parallel textual witnesses, with Jingui Yaolue selected for this reference.
Raw Skill references and local source texts remain unchanged; corrections are overlays in adjudication and provenance data.
No quote, dose, treatment, diagnosis, prognosis, emergency instruction, or self-care instruction becomes runtime eligible through this inventory.

checks.detail: database/tcm/skill-v3/references/45-经典-金匮要略杂病方证条文.md
Reverses the order of two clauses from one source passage, placing the treatment rule before the explanation of excessive sweating.
Modern shorthand used by the reference commentary, not wording from Jingui Yaolue.
Drops 其 from 其恶寒甚 and regularizes punctuation; otherwise traceable to the Jingui and Shanghan duplicate passage.
The source reads 酸枣汤; the reference inserts the modern parenthetical alias 酸枣仁汤 inside the quotation.
Stitches the initial symptom from one question and the prognosis clauses from the following passage.
The local text, CText, and Wikisource read 大逆上气. The reference and the Nihaisha course page card read 火逆上气, showing that the secondary course locator cannot override the classical witnesses.
Drops 此为肺胀 from the middle of the source sentence.
The local witness writes 苓桂术甘汤 while the reference uses 朮; the passage is otherwise traceable.
Drops the opening 夫 and writes 朮 where the local witness has 术.
Compresses two parallel clauses by omitting 上气脚缩 and 下甚者，手足不仁.
Drops 如肿状 and 脉数 from the source passage.
Joins the 甘草粉蜜汤 worm-pain passage with the following 蛔厥 passage.
The local file has OCR placeholder A2K0痛. CText and Wikisource support 㽲痛; the Nihaisha page card modernizes it to 绞痛 and remains locator-only.
The local file reads 膀肽. CText and Wikisource support 膀胱; the raw file remains unchanged and the Nihaisha page card is only a secondary locator.
Adds the editorial textual-variant gloss 利一作血 inside the quotation and abridges the intervening question and answer.
Compresses 取灶中灰两石余以埋人 into a modern shorthand label.
Normalizes the local 蠏 to 蟹 and omits the following qualification 其熟者，乃可食之.
